meta.title: Wait Until The Criminals ...
meta.description: Excerpt from Dale's S4x19 mini-keynote. We are moving forward, making progress, in OT security. The problem is we are still falling further behind due to increased threat and improvement driven changes ... and this was before the inevitable criminal element affected OT.
